Manages app idle timeouts, battery UI, display calibration, language changes, user preferences, quick launch, shell transitions, shutdown behavior, system app registry, app state machine, watchface interactions, and welcome notifications in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[app_idle_timeout.c](app_idle_timeout.c.md)**: Manages app idle timeout functionality, including start, stop, pause, resume, and refresh operations.
- **[app_idle_timeout.h](app_idle_timeout.h.md)**: Functions to manage the idle timeout for an app, including start, stop, pause, resume, and refresh.
- **[battery_ui.c](battery_ui.c.md)**: Implements UI functions to display battery status, including charging, fully charged, and warnings.
- **[battery_ui.h](battery_ui.h.md)**: Functions and types for handling battery UI events and displaying battery status dialogs.
- **[battery_ui_fsm.c](battery_ui_fsm.c.md)**: Implements a state machine for managing battery UI notifications and modal dismissals based on charge state.
- **[display_calibration_prompt.c](display_calibration_prompt.c.md)**: Manages the display calibration prompt for potentially misaligned watches on the Spalding platform.
- **[display_calibration_prompt.h](display_calibration_prompt.h.md)**: Function to conditionally show the display calibration prompt.
- **[language_ui.c](language_ui.c.md)**: Handles the display of a dialog when the language setting changes in the Pebble firmware.
- **[language_ui.h](language_ui.h.md)**: Displays a dialog to indicate a language change.
- **[prefs.c](prefs.c.md)**: Manages user preferences and settings for the Pebble firmware, including clock, backlight, and quick launch configurations.
- **[prefs_values.h.inc](prefs_values.h.inc.md)**: Defines preference keys and their associated variables for the Pebble firmware.
- **[quick_launch.h](quick_launch.h.md)**: Functions to manage quick launch settings for apps using button identifiers.
- **[shell.c](shell.c.md)**: Defines functions for managing compositor transitions between apps in the Pebble firmware.
- **[shell_event_loop.c](shell_event_loop.c.md)**: Initializes and handles events for the Pebble shell event loop, including notifications and app management.
- **[shutdown_charging.c](shutdown_charging.c.md)**: Manages shutdown behavior and UI for a Pebble device when charging is disconnected.
- **[system_app_registry_list.json](system_app_registry_list.json.md)**: Defines system and resource applications for Pebble firmware with specific IDs, enums, and metadata.
- **[system_app_state_machine.c](system_app_state_machine.c.md)**: Implements the app-to-app flow logic for the Pebble firmware's normal shell, managing app transitions and root states.
- **[watchface.c](watchface.c.md)**: Manages watchface interactions, button events, and app launches for Pebble firmware.
- **[watchface.h](watchface.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and managing watchface events and settings in Pebble firmware.
- **[welcome.c](welcome.c.md)**: Sends a welcome notification to users upgrading from version 3.x to 4.x of the firmware.
- **[welcome.h](welcome.h.md)**: Defines the WelcomeVersion enum and functions for managing firmware welcome notifications.
